pages.text: A supreme spellstone bound to creation and survival.$(br2)It grants flight, protects from many damage sources, and can call lightning upon nearby enemies.
pages.title: Heart of Creation

pages.text: When carried or equipped, it may prevent death by leaving the bearer at the edge of life.$(br2)This protection is powerful, but it should not be mistaken for carelessness.
pages.title: Immortality
